name: Tuna-Macarooni Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cook macaroni until tender, then drain.
3. Melt butter in the same pot, add onions and green pepper, and sauté over low heat for 5 minutes.
4. Add flour, salt, and pepper, stirring to blend well.
5. Gradually add milk and frozen green peas (optional) to the mixture, followed by cream of mushroom soup. Stir until smooth.
6. Add macaroni, flaked tuna, peas, and half the cheese to the sauce, stirring to combine well.
7. Pour the mixture into a 2-quart buttered casserole dish.
8. Top with the remaining shredded cheddar cheese and sprinkle generously with paprika.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes, or until nicely browned.
This casserole reheats easily over low heat in a saucepan or in the microwave at 50%.
